action.content: Write an itinerary for a trip to a grocery store in Lima to buy some local goods. Make the itinerary funny, write it in all capital letters and include the keywords 'DISGUSTING', 'DELICIOUS', 'BAD', and 'GOOD'.
action.label: context

action.content:
OH MY GOD, WE ARE GOING TO THE GROCERY STORE IN LIMA! LET'S GO!

08:00 AM - WE ARRIVE AT THE STORE. IT IS SO BIG AND SO NOISY. THE AIR IS SO HOT.

08:15 AM - WE ENTER. THE FIRST THING WE SEE IS A SIGN THAT SAYS "DISGUSTING" ABOUT THE FOOD. IT MAKES ME LAUGH.

08:30 AM - WE GO TO THE FRUIT SECTION. I SEE A BANANA THAT LOOKS LIKE A CLOUD. IT IS SO DELICIOUS! BUT THEN I SEE A PEAR THAT LOOKS LIKE A BAD IDEA. IT IS SO BAD!

09:00 AM - WE GO TO THE MEAT SECTION. THE COWS ARE SO TALL. I SEE A PORK CHICKEN THAT LOOKS LIKE A BAD IDEA. IT IS SO BAD! BUT THEN I SEE A BEEF RIBS THAT LOOK LIKE A GOOD IDEA. IT IS SO GOOD!
